site.tagline: Showcasing The Best Porn From Independent Creators. New lists every few days
site.footerText: Email to submit your own content! Include the name, a link to it, and up to 100 character summary. I'll email you if you're include in the next list!

signup.heading: GET THE NEXT LIST
signup.description: Drop your email to get notified when a new lineup goes out. No spam, just shout outs.

support.heading: SUPPORT THE SITE
support.description: Keep new lists coming! Support helps cover hosting and time spent curating.

paragraphs.text: A Sinful Sweetheart <3. 30, flirty, and probably horny. 🫦
Summoning all the love and light out of the back half of our lives. Allowing myself to flourish while loving myself and him in more authentic and adventurous ways because someday it all ends.
I'm your girl-next-door...but also your freaky neighbour. Just here to express myself 🙈
Being pregnant never stopped anyone from being sexy
Happily married, kink-positive, and a little wicked. Seeking couples, women, trans women & fem/vers men to play, explore, and spark real chemistry.
22F Just doing it for the plot (Alt account is u/Rattwos). Warning: I read all DMs, but you need to be interesting and unique to get a reply!
